title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Spiral Review
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a defense-in-depth network security plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish confidentiality, integrity, availability, risk, threat, vulnerability, exploit, likelihood, and impact.
Protect data in transit and at rest and explain certificates, PKI trust, self-signed limits, key management, and rotation.
Use MFA, SSO, RADIUS, LDAP, SAML, TACACS+, time-based authentication, authorization, RBAC, and least privilege appropriately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for network security that tests this competency: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Net Acl Filtering trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design ordered acl, url, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.

content.text: For Net Acl Filtering, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Net Acl Filtering precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Artifact under review: a complete first version of a defense-in-depth network security plan while every earlier competency remains active.

Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the review Net Cia Risk Terms case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the review Net Cia Risk Terms case

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Net Acl Filtering: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed review case for network security that tests this competency: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Net Acl Filtering through the concrete a complete first version of a defense-in-depth network security plan while every earlier competency remains active case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.

hints: Name the Net Acl Filtering precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case for network security that tests this competency: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: An ACL automatically evaluates the most specific rule before earlier rules.
